The '''Jatayus Trading Consortium''', named after the [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] [[Jatayus|goddess]] of prosperity, was a large company with its headquarters on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]]. It began life as a normal company, but was taken over by [[Sprax]], who used the conglomerate and its branches, including [[Jatayus Outbound]], as a front for his business as a [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

{{Company-stub}}
